popularStory.headline: My Maternal 18th. Great Scottish Grandfather, Angus Og MacDonald, 6th. Lord of the Isles
popularStory.description:
Name: Angus Og MacDonald, 6th. Lord of the Isles, 1st. Chief of Clan MacDonald
Born: 1272 in Icolmkill, Iona, Argyll, Scotland
Married: 1299 Isle of Islay, Argyll, Scotland to Aine "Agnes" O'Cathain o …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes O Cathan於1279年出生在愛爾蘭武爾斯特時，她的父親Guy O'Cathan King of Keenaght, Ulster36歲，母親Agnes Magness MacDonald23歲。她於1299年與Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯爾 本 易納結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1368年在她的家鄉享年89歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭武爾斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes O Cathan于1279年出生在爱尔兰武爾斯特时，她的父亲Guy O'Cathan King of Keenaght, Ulster36岁，母亲Agnes Magness MacDonald23岁。她于1299年与Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles在苏格兰阿吉爾易斯爾 本 易納结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1368年在她的家乡享年89岁，埋葬在爱尔兰武爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: O
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

variants.name: Oh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

nameMeanings.name: Cathan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Muslim (mainly India and Pakistan): ethnic name for a Pathan or Pashtun, a member of a major ethnic group of Afghanistan and northwestern Pakistan.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes O Cathan was born in 1279, in Ulster, Ireland, her father, Guy O'Cathan King of Keenaght, Ulster, was 36 and her mother, Agnes Magness MacDonald, was 23. She married Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles in 1299, in Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1368, in her hometown, at the age of 89, and was buried in Ulster, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes O Cathan est née en 1279, à Ulster, Irlande, son père, Guy O'Cathan King of Keenaght, Ulster, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Agnes Magness MacDonald, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles en 1299, à Isle of Iona, Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1368, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterrée à Ulster, Irlande.

Sie starb 1368 im Alter von 89 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Ulster, Irland begraben.

Lei sposato Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles nel 1299, nel Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. ko.lifeSummary: Agnes O Cathan(이)가 1279년 아일랜드 울스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy O'Cathan King of Keenaght, Ulster(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Magness MacDonald(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1299년 스컷랜드 아그이 이슬일 프 이오나에서 Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1368년 그녀의 고향에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 울스터에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles em 1299, em Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes O Cathan родилась в 1279 г. в местности улстир, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Guy O'Cathan King of Keenaght, Ulster было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Magness MacDonald, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles в 1299 г. в местности исл оф иона, аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1368 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности улстир, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes O Cathan nació en 1279, en Ulster, Irlanda, su papá, Guy O'Cathan King of Keenaght, Ulster, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Agnes Magness MacDonald, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles en 1299, en Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1368, en su pueblo, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultada en Ulster, Irlanda.
